meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Aerospace Village  - Matt Gaffney - MITM The Mystery in the Middle
meta.description:
I intend on delivering an overview of the following:
Systems which interact with the AISD highlighting to operators the importance of cybersecurity in this network domain of aircraft.
ARINC 821
Electronic Flight Bags
Ground systems
PKI used
Flight Attendant Panels
Maintenance terminals
Threats to the AISD and where I feel security concerns exist.
I will NOT discuss any vulnerabilities i may or may not have discovered but are there any other topics related to the AISD you would like me to include? I am especially interested to hear from operators and their feedback.
